note: Agentic coding on M4 Pro 24 GB — models above ram_budget_gb are listed but not auto-selected

models.label: Qwen3 8B uniform 4-bit — stable tool calling, good speed
Gemma 4 26B-A4B MoE — 4B active params (fast), SS-tier tool calling for OpenCode; ~14 GB
Qwen3 14B uniform 4-bit — AVOID: hallucinates results instead of calling tools
Qwen3.5 27B OptiQ — higher quality but tight on 24 GB at long context
Qwen3.6 35B-A3B MoE — 3B active params (fast), 35B quality; ~20 GB, tight on 24 GB
Qwen3.6 27B dense — latest generation, ~14 GB, leaves little headroom on 24 GB

watch.label: Qwen3.6 9B — does not exist yet; Qwen3.6 currently only ships 27B and 35B-A3B
